bugs.class: auth-gap (IDOR + mass-assignment: no owner check on :id, whole req.body written so a user can set role:admin)
no-null-check (findByIdAndUpdate returns null for a missing id; responds 200 with null instead of 404)
race (TOCTOU on email uniqueness; concurrent registrations both pass the findOne check)
credential-exposure (password stored in plaintext and the created user incl. password is returned to the client)
